overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking through a grassy prairie at dusk. The character follows a dirt path past a distinctive dead tree and encounters a group of mounted riders, with the sky transitioning from dark dusk to warm golden hour colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy prairie path approaching dead tree

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt trail through tall grass toward a distinctive forked dead tree

entered.detail: tall dead tree with distinctive forked branches silhouetted against the sky
narrow dirt trail cutting through the grassy field
tall green grass with scattered yellow wildflowers covering the prairie
dense dark tree line marking the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through an open grassy prairie at dusk. A distinctive dead tree with forked branches stands ahead against a darkening cloudy sky, while distant forests line the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with rocky outcrop and camp

events.description: sky transitions from dark dusk to warm golden hour with pink and orange clouds

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past the dead tree toward a rocky hillside

entered.detail: large gray rock formation on the hillside
mature green tree growing near the rocks
white canvas tent visible in the grass off the path

segments.scene_description: Passing the dead tree, the scene opens into broader prairie as the sky brightens to golden hour. The character approaches a rocky outcrop with a large oak tree and passes a white camp tent on the left, with the landscape bathed in warm sunset colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie path with mounted rider encounter

events.description: group of three mounted riders approach and pass by on the path

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as a group of riders approaches from ahead

notable_agents.action: group of three riders on horseback approaching and passing by the character

segments.scene_description: In the final moments, the character encounters a group of three mounted riders traveling in the opposite direction. The riders pass by on the grassy trail as the character continues walking, with the rocky outcrop now receding into the distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a darkening prairie that gradually transforms into a warm, sun-drenched landscape. It begins with a character walking along a narrow dirt path under a cloudy dusk sky, moving toward a distinctive dead tree with forked branches. As the character passes the tree, the scene opens into a broader prairie where the lighting shifts from gray to golden hour, revealing a white camp tent and a large oak tree beside a rocky outcrop. The camera then continues forward as the landscape is bathed in sunset colors, finally encountering a group of three mounted riders traveling in the opposite direction. The riders pass by on the grassy trail while the rocky outcrop recedes into the distance behind.
